title: Florida Vehicle Title Transfer (Form HSMV 82040)
description: Transfer ownership of a motor vehicle to a new owner in Florida using the data model of Form HSMV 82040 (Application for Certificate of Motor Vehicle Title). HSMV 82040 is a single, multi-purpose FLHSMV form: an 'Application Type' checkbox at the top selects between Original (first-ever Florida title, no ownership change) and Transfer, and several 'if applicable' sections cover lienholders, sales-tax exemptions, repossession, and other certifications. This document models the Transfer application type only. The form is not submitted online: it is printed at the top with 'Please submit this form to your local tax collector office or license plate agency', and is filed in person or by mail at a county tax collector office or license plate agency. Out of scope: the Original application type (a distinct process — a vehicle's first-ever Florida certificate of title with no change of ownership); the 'Off-Highway Vehicle Type' checkboxes (All-Terrain Vehicle/Recreational Off-Highway Vehicle/Off-Highway Motorcycle-specific); Section 3 brand/usage/condition checkboxes (e.g. rebuilt, flood, kit car — vehicle-condition flags orthogonal to the ownership transfer); the vehicle length (feet/inches) fields (trailer-specific); Section 7 (Dealer Sales Tax Report and motor vehicle trade-in information, dealer-only); Section 8 (VIN physical-inspection verification, completed and signed by a third-party licensed Florida dealer, Florida notary public, law enforcement officer, or authorized FLHSMV/tax collector/license plate agency employee — not data the applicant supplies); and Section 13 (Release of Spouse or Heirs Interest, a decedent's-estate transfer scenario). It does not submit the application; the live Florida Department of Highway Safety and Motor Vehicles source is always authoritative (see VERIFICATION.md).

authority.name: Florida Department of Highway Safety and Motor Vehicles

verification.notes: Source-derived reference schema transcribed field-by-field from the live Form HSMV 82040 (Rev. 07/23) AcroForm PDF at flhsmv.gov, fetched directly with curl at HTTP 200 (no CDN block encountered; response Last-Modified header of 2024-01-10 is consistent with the form's own printed 'Rev. 07/23' revision line). Both layers of the PDF were decoded: page.getTextContent() (pdfjs-dist) for the printed instruction/warning prose, and page.getAnnotations() for the AcroForm's 226 named field widgets across both pages, which is the authoritative source for exact field labels, groupings (e.g. which checkboxes share one radio-group fieldName), and page/section placement. Status remains 'draft' pending independent second-reviewer field-by-field re-check.

fields.name: certificateOfTitlePrintOption
fields.label: Request to print Certificate of Title
fields.description: no = do not print a paper certificate of title at this time (Florida allows electronic title records with no paper title issued). yes_in_office = print the paper title for pickup in office. yes_mailed = print and mail the paper title.

fields.name: ownerCustomerNumber
fields.label: Customer Number
fields.description: FLHSMV customer number, if the owner already has one on file. The form's adjacent Fleet Number and Unit Number fields are fleet-account-specific and out of scope for this document.

fields.name: ownerIsDeafOrHardOfHearing
fields.label: Are you deaf or hard of hearing?
fields.description: Voluntary.

fields.name: jointOwnershipType
fields.label: Joint ownership — OR or AND
fields.description: When there is joint ownership, whether 'or' or 'and' is to be shown on the title when issued. If neither box is checked, the title will be issued with 'and.'

fields.name: lifeEstateOrRemainderPerson
fields.label: Life Estate/Remainder Person
fields.description: Select, if applicable. The form permits selecting more than one of lifeEstateOrRemainderPerson, tenancyByTheEntirety, and withRightsOfSurvivorship, so no mutual exclusivity is asserted among them.

fields.name: tenancyByTheEntirety
fields.label: Tenancy by the Entirety
fields.description: Select, if applicable. See lifeEstateOrRemainderPerson.

fields.name: withRightsOfSurvivorship
fields.label: With Rights of Survivorship
fields.description: Select, if applicable. See lifeEstateOrRemainderPerson.

fields.name: ownerFullName
fields.label: Owner's Name as It Appears on Driver License (First, Full Middle/Maiden, & Last Name)

fields.name: ownerPhone
fields.label: Owner's Phone Number
fields.description: Voluntary. International E.164 format, e.g. +19045551234.

fields.name: ownerEmail
fields.label: Owner's Email
fields.description: Voluntary.

fields.name: ownerSex
fields.label: Owner's Sex
fields.description: As recorded on the owner's driver license/ID; the form does not print its own closed code list for this box, so no enum is asserted here.

fields.name: ownerDlOrFeidNumber
fields.label: Owner's FL DL/ID or FEID/Suffix Number
fields.description: Florida driver license/ID number, or Federal Employer Identification Number (FEID) with suffix when the owner is a business entity.

fields.name: ownerMailingAddressState
fields.label: Owner's Mailing Address — state
fields.description: Two-letter USPS state abbreviation.

fields.name: ownerMailingAddressZipCode
fields.label: Owner's Mailing Address — ZIP code
fields.description: 5-digit or ZIP+4 U.S. format.

fields.name: ownerResidentialAddressState
fields.label: Owner's Residential Street Address — state
fields.description: Two-letter USPS state abbreviation.

fields.name: ownerResidentialAddressZipCode
fields.label: Owner's Residential Street Address — ZIP code

fields.name: mailToName
fields.label: Mail To Customer Name
fields.description: If the certificate of title should be mailed to someone other than the owner named above.

fields.name: mailToPhone
fields.label: Mail To's Phone Number
fields.description: Voluntary. Required when mailToName is given. International E.164 format.

fields.name: mailToEmail
fields.label: Mail To's Email
fields.description: Voluntary.

fields.name: mailToDlOrFeidNumber
fields.label: Mail To's FL DL/ID or FEID/Suffix Number

fields.name: mailToAddressLine1
fields.label: Mail To's Address
fields.description: If different from the above mailing address.

fields.name: coOwnerIsFloridaResident
fields.label: Co-Owner — Are you a Florida Resident?
fields.description: Only if the new registration has a co-owner or lessee.

fields.name: coOwnerIsUsCitizen
fields.label: Co-Owner — Are you a US Citizen?

fields.name: coOwnerIsDeafOrHardOfHearing
fields.label: Co-Owner — Are you deaf or hard of hearing?
fields.description: Voluntary.

fields.name: coOwnerOrLesseeType
fields.label: Co-Owner or Lessee
fields.description: Required when a second name is given in coOwnerFullName.

fields.name: coOwnerFullName
fields.label: Co-Owner's or Lessee's Name as It Appears on Driver License (First, Full Middle/Maiden, & Last Name)

fields.name: coOwnerPhone
fields.label: Co-Owner's Phone Number
fields.description: Voluntary. International E.164 format.

fields.name: coOwnerEmail
fields.label: Co-Owner's Email
fields.description: Voluntary.

fields.name: coOwnerDlOrFeidNumber
fields.label: Co-Owner's FL DL/ID or FEID/Suffix Number

fields.name: coOwnerResidentialAddressZipCode
fields.label: Co-Owner's/Lessee's Residential Street Address — ZIP code

fields.name: floridaTitleNumber
fields.label: Florida Title Number
fields.description: The vehicle's existing Florida title number, when it is already titled in Florida.

fields.name: previousStateOfIssue
fields.label: Previous State of Issue
fields.description: Two-letter USPS abbreviation of the state that previously issued a title or registration for this vehicle, when it is coming from out of state.

fields.name: vehicleGvw
fields.label: GVW
fields.description: Gross Vehicle Weight, if applicable.

fields.name: vehicleBhpOrCc
fields.label: BHP/CC
fields.description: Brake horsepower (BHP) or engine displacement in cubic centimeters (CC), as applicable to the vehicle type; the form prints a single combined blank, not two separate boxes.

fields.name: vanUseType
fields.label: Van Use
fields.description: If applicable — only for a van.

fields.name: fuelType
fields.label: Fuel Type
fields.description: Alternative fuel type, only if applicable. Leave unset for a conventional gasoline or diesel vehicle; the form prints no checkbox for those, only for the alternative fuel types listed here.

fields.name: hasElectronicLienTitleAccount
fields.label: ELT Customer
fields.description: Whether the lienholder participates in Florida's Electronic Lien and Title (ELT) program. Only if a lienholder applies.

fields.name: lienholderIdType
fields.label: Lienholder identifier type
fields.description: Which identifier is being supplied for the lienholder in lienholderIdValue. Only if a lienholder applies.

fields.name: lienholderIdValue
fields.label: Lienholder's FEID/Suffix #, DMV Account #, or DL/ID #, Sex and DOB
fields.description: Required when lienholderIdType is given.

fields.name: lienholderPhone
fields.label: Lienholder's Phone Number
fields.description: Voluntary. International E.164 format.

fields.name: lienholderEmail
fields.label: Lienholder's Email
fields.description: Voluntary.

fields.name: lienholderName
fields.label: Lienholder's Name
fields.description: If this box is not checked (see lienholderAuthorizesMailTitleToOwner), the title will be mailed to the first lienholder.

fields.name: lienholderAuthorizesMailTitleToOwner
fields.label: Check this box if you, lienholder representative, authorize the Department to send the motor vehicle title to the owner
fields.description: On the paper form this checkbox is paired with the lienholder representative's signature. When unchecked (the default), the title is mailed to the first lienholder instead of the owner.

fields.name: acquisitionType
fields.label: How and when was the motor vehicle acquired?
fields.description: If ownership has transferred, how the motor vehicle was acquired.

fields.name: salePrice
fields.label: Sale price
fields.description: U.S. dollars.

fields.name: odometerDigitCount
fields.label: 5- or 6-digit odometer
fields.description: Whether the odometer reads in five or six digits.

fields.name: odometerReading
fields.label: Odometer reading
fields.description: Whole miles only, no tenths.

fields.name: odometerCertification
fields.label: Odometer certification
fields.description: WARNING: Federal and State law requires that you state the mileage in connection with an application for a Certificate of Title. Failure to complete or providing a false statement may result in fines or imprisonment.

fields.name: salesTaxExemptionCertificateBasis
fields.label: Sales tax exemption — certificate basis
fields.description: If applicable. Certifies the vehicle is exempt from Florida Sales and Use Tax (Chapter 212, Florida Statutes) on this certificate-based ground.

fields.name: rentalSalesTaxRegistrationNumber
fields.label: Sales Tax Registration Number (rental use)
fields.description: The purchase of a recreational vehicle to be offered for rent as living accommodations does not qualify for this exemption.

fields.name: salesTaxExemptionTransactionReason
fields.label: Ownership of this vehicle is not subject to Florida Sales and Use Tax for the following reason
fields.description: If applicable — a second, transaction-type-based exemption ground, distinct from salesTaxExemptionCertificateBasis.

fields.name: otherExemptionReasonSpecify
fields.label: Specify — other sales tax exemption reason

fields.name: evenTradeOrTradeDownTerms
fields.label: Terms of even trade or trade down
fields.description: State the facts of the even trade or trade down and the transferor information, including the transferor's name and address.

fields.name: certifiesRepossession
fields.label: I certify that this motor vehicle was repossessed upon default in the terms of the lien instrument and is now in my possession

fields.name: certifiesTitleLostOrDestroyed
fields.label: I certify that the certificate of title is lost or destroyed

fields.name: certifiesVehicleNotOperatedUntilRegistered
fields.label: The vehicle identified will not be operated on the streets and highways of this state until properly registered

fields.name: applicantAttestsFactsTrueUnderPenaltyOfPerjury
fields.label: Under penalties of perjury, I declare that I have read the foregoing document and that the facts stated in it are true

fields.name: coApplicantSignatureDate
fields.label: Date of Applicant, Co-Owner signature
fields.description: Only when a co-owner is also applying and signing.

fields.name: physicallyInspectedVin
fields.label: I/We physically inspected the VIN
fields.description: A self-certification by the applicant(s), distinct from the third-party inspector verification in Section 8 (out of scope for this document — see the top-level description).

steps.title: Mail-to recipient, if different from owner
